Cargo.toml

[package]
name = #032f62;\">"byz_cascading_quorum"
version = #032f62;\">"0.1.0"
edition = #032f62;\">"2024"
default-run = #032f62;\">"byz_cascading_quorum"

[dependencies]
chrono = #032f62;\">"0.4.44"
sha2 = #032f62;\">"0.10.9"

[[bin]]
name = #032f62;\">"byz_cascading_quorum"
path = #032f62;\">"src/bin/byz_cascading_quorum.rs"

[[bin]]

path = #032f62;\">"src/bin/utc_consensus.rs"

README.md

## [byz\_cascading\_quorum.rs](https://gitworkshop.dev/npub10xlxvlhemja6c4dqv22uapctqupfhlxm9h8z3k2e72q4k9hcz7vqpkge6d/relay.damus.io/byz-cascading-quorum)

### 1. install gnostr

```
cargo install gnostr

```

### 2. run

```
WEEBLE=$(gnostr --weeble); \
BLOCKHEIGHT=$(gnostr --blockheight); \
WOBBLE=$(gnostr --wobble); \
cargo -q run > $WEEBLE-$BLOCKHEIGHT-$WOBBLE.txt && \
git add . && \
gnostr legit -m #032f62;\">"$WEEBLE/$BLOCKHEIGHT/$WOBBLE" --pow beef

```

### or

```
WEEBLE=$(gnostr --weeble); \
BLOCKHEIGHT=$(gnostr --blockheight); \
WOBBLE=$(gnostr --wobble); \
cargo -q run > $WEEBLE-$BLOCKHEIGHT-$WOBBLE.txt && \
cargo -q run --bin utc_consensus >> $WEEBLE-$BLOCKHEIGHT-$WOBBLE.txt && \
git add . && gnostr legit -m #032f62;\">"$WEEBLE/$BLOCKHEIGHT/$WOBBLE" --pow beef

```

### or

```
WEEBLE=$(gnostr --weeble); \
BLOCKHEIGHT=$(gnostr --blockheight); \
WOBBLE=$(gnostr --wobble); \
cargo -q run > $WEEBLE-$BLOCKHEIGHT-$WOBBLE.txt && \
cargo -q run --bin utc_consensus >> $WEEBLE-$BLOCKHEIGHT-$WOBBLE.txt && \
git add . && \
gnostr legit -m #032f62;\">"$WEEBLE/$BLOCKHEIGHT/$WOBBLE" --pow $(gnostr --weeble)
```

### or

```
WEEBLE=$(gnostr --weeble); \
BLOCKHEIGHT=$(gnostr --blockheight); \
WOBBLE=$(gnostr --wobble); cargo -q run > $WEEBLE-$BLOCKHEIGHT-$WOBBLE.txt && \
cargo -q run --bin utc_consensus >> $WEEBLE-$BLOCKHEIGHT-$WOBBLE.txt && \
git add . && \
gnostr legit -m #032f62;\">"$WEEBLE/$BLOCKHEIGHT/$WOBBLE" --pow $(gnostr --wobble)
```

### or 

```
WEEBLE=$(gnostr --weeble); \
BLOCKHEIGHT=$(gnostr --blockheight); \
WOBBLE=$(gnostr --wobble); cargo -q run > $WEEBLE-$BLOCKHEIGHT-$WOBBLE.txt && \
cargo -q run --bin utc_consensus >> $WEEBLE-$BLOCKHEIGHT-$WOBBLE.txt && \
cargo -q run --bin byz_time >> $WEEBLE-$BLOCKHEIGHT-$WOBBLE.txt && \
git add . && \
gnostr legit -m #032f62;\">"$WEEBLE/$BLOCKHEIGHT/$WOBBLE" --pow $WOBBLE && \
gnostr legit -m #032f62;\">"$WEEBLE/$BLOCKHEIGHT/$WOBBLE" --pow $WEEBLE
```

src/bin/byz_cascading_quorum.rs

#d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">use chrono::{DateTime, Duration, Utc, Timelike};
#d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">use sha2::{Sha256, Digest};

// --- GIT-COMPLIANT SHA-1 ENGINE ---
#d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">fn git_sha1(data: &[u8]) -> String {
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut h0: u32 = 0x67452301; let mut h1: u32 = 0xEFCDAB89;
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut h2: u32 = 0x98BADCFE; let mut h3: u32 = 0x10325476;
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut h4: u32 = 0xC3D2E1F0;
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut padded = data.to_vec();
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let bit_len = (padded.len() as u64) * 8;
    padded.push(0x80);
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">while (padded.len() * 8) % 512 != 448 { padded.push(0); }
    padded.extend_from_slice(&bit_len.to_be_bytes());
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">for chunk in padded.chunks(64) {
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut w = [0u32; 80];
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">for i in 0..16 { w[i] = u32::from_be_bytes([chunk[i*4], chunk[i*4+1], chunk[i*4+2], chunk[i*4+3]]); }
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">for i in 16..80 { w[i] = (w[i-3] ^ w[i-8] ^ w[i-14] ^ w[i-16]).rotate_left(1); }
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let (mut a, mut b, mut c, mut d, mut e) = (h0, h1, h2, h3, h4);
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">for i in 0..80 {
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let (f, k) = match i {
                0..=19 => ((b & c) | ((!b) & d), 0x5A827999),
                20..=39 => (b ^ c ^ d, 0x6ED9EBA1),
                40..=59 => ((b & c) | (b & d) | (c & d), 0x8F1BBCDC),
                _ => (b ^ c ^ d, 0xCA62C1D6),
            };
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let temp = a.rotate_left(5).wrapping_add(f).wrapping_add(e).wrapping_add(k).wrapping_add(w[i]);
            e = d; d = c; c = b.rotate_left(30); b = a; a = temp;
        }
        h0 = h0.wrapping_add(a); h1 = h1.wrapping_add(b);
        h2 = h2.wrapping_add(c); h3 = h3.wrapping_add(d); h4 = h4.wrapping_add(e);
    }
    format!(#032f62;\">"{:08x}{:08x}{:08x}{:08x}{:08x}", h0, h1, h2, h3, h4)
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, PartialOrd)]
#d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub enum SyncStage { Hour, Minute, Second, NonceGrind1Bit, NonceGrind2Bit, Sha256Mining }

#d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub struct SyncNode {
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub id: usize,
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub adjustment: Duration,
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub stage: SyncStage,
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub nonce: u64,
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub success: bool,
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub last_hash: String,
}

#d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">impl SyncNode {
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub fn new(id: usize, offset_sec: i64) -> Self {
        Self {
            id,
            adjustment: Duration::seconds(offset_sec),
            stage: SyncStage::Hour,
            nonce: 0,
            success: false,
            last_hash: String::from(#032f62;\">"0000000000000000000000000000000000000000"),
        }
    }

    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub fn get_logical_utc(&self) -> DateTime<Utc> {
        Utc::now() + self.adjustment
    }

    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub fn update_stage(&mut self, spread: i64, all_same_minute: bool, global_success_reached: bool) {
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">match self.stage {
            SyncStage::Hour => #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if spread < 3600 { self.stage = SyncStage::Minute; },
            SyncStage::Minute => #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if spread < 60 { self.stage = SyncStage::Second; },
            SyncStage::Second => #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if spread == 0 && all_same_minute { self.stage = SyncStage::NonceGrind1Bit; },
            SyncStage::NonceGrind1Bit => {
                #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if spread > 0 || !all_same_minute {
                    self.stage = SyncStage::Second;
                    self.success = false;
                    self.nonce = 0;
                } #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">else if global_success_reached {
                    self.stage = SyncStage::NonceGrind2Bit;
                    self.success = false;
                }
            },
            SyncStage::NonceGrind2Bit => {
                #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if spread > 0 || !all_same_minute {
                    self.stage = SyncStage::Second;
                    self.success = false;
                    self.nonce = 0;
                } #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">else if global_success_reached {
                    self.stage = SyncStage::Sha256Mining;
                    self.success = false;
                    self.nonce = 0;
                }
            },
            SyncStage::Sha256Mining => {
                #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if spread > 0 {
                    self.stage = SyncStage::Second;
                    self.success = false;
                    self.nonce = 0;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub fn grind_nonce(&mut self, target: &str) {
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let time = self.get_logical_utc();
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let minute = time.minute();
        
        loop {
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let input = format!("BLOCK-{}-{}", minute, self.nonce);
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let hash = git_sha1(input.as_bytes());
            
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if target == "00" {
                #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if hash.starts_with("000") {
                    self.last_hash = hash;
                    self.success = true;
                    break;
                } #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">else if hash.starts_with("0") {
                    self.last_hash = hash;
                    self.nonce += 1;
                    break;
                }
            } #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">else {
                self.last_hash = hash;
                #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if self.last_hash.starts_with(target) { self.success = true; } else { self.nonce += 1; }
                break;
            }
            self.nonce += 1;
        }
    }

    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub fn mine_sha256(&mut self, target: &str) {
        loop {
            // We use the last hash as a base (which is the SHA-1 consensus hash when the phase starts)
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let input = format!("{}-{}", self.last_hash, self.nonce);
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut hasher = Sha256::new();
            hasher.update(input.as_bytes());
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let hash = format!("{:x}", hasher.finalize());

            // 1-bit minimum: Only update last_hash and exit loop if it starts with '0'
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if hash.starts_with('0') {
                #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if hash.starts_with(target) {
                    self.last_hash = hash;
                    self.success = true;
                } #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">else {
                    self.last_hash = hash;
                    // If we found a 1-bit but not the 2-bit target, increment nonce 
                    // for the next iteration call to ensure we don't repeat this hash.
                    self.nonce += 1;
                }
                break;
            }
            self.nonce += 1;
        }
    }
}

#d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">fn get_median_diff(timestamps: &[i64], current: i64) -> i64 {
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut diffs: Vec<i64> = timestamps.iter().map(|t| t - current).collect();
    diffs.sort();
    diffs[diffs.len() / 2]
}

#d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">fn main() {
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut nodes: Vec<SyncNode> = (0..10).map(|i| {
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let offset = match i { 0..=2 => 10, 3..=5 => 5, _ => 2 };
        SyncNode::new(i, offset)
    }).collect();

    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut round = 1;
    loop {
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let current_times: Vec<DateTime<Utc>> = nodes.iter().map(|n| n.get_logical_utc()).collect();
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let timestamps: Vec<i64> = current_times.iter().map(|t| t.timestamp()).collect();
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let spread = (timestamps.iter().max().unwrap() - timestamps.iter().min().unwrap()).abs();
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let all_same_minute = current_times.iter().all(|t| t.minute() == current_times[0].minute());
        
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let global_step_reached = nodes.iter().all(|n| n.success);

        println!(#032f62;\">"\n--- [ROUND {:03}] Spread:{}s | MinSync:{} | Phase:{:?} ---", round, spread, all_same_minute, nodes[0].stage);

        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">for i in 0..10 {
            nodes[i].update_stage(spread, all_same_minute, global_step_reached);
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">match nodes[i].stage {
                SyncStage::Hour | SyncStage::Minute | SyncStage::Second => {
                    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let d = get_median_diff(&timestamps, timestamps[i]);
                    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let step = if nodes[i].stage == SyncStage::Second { d.signum() } else { d / 2 };
                    nodes[i].adjustment = nodes[i].adjustment + Duration::seconds(step);
                },
                SyncStage::NonceGrind1Bit => { #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if !nodes[i].success { nodes[i].grind_nonce("0"); } }
                SyncStage::NonceGrind2Bit => { #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if !nodes[i].success { nodes[i].grind_nonce("00"); } }
                SyncStage::Sha256Mining => { #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if !nodes[i].success { nodes[i].mine_sha256("00"); } }
            };

            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mark = if nodes[i].success { "SOLVED " } else { "WAITING" };
            println!(
                #032f62;\">"N{:02}|S:{}|UTC:{}|Nonce:{:<6}|{}|HASH:{}", 
                i, nodes[i].stage as u8, current_times[i].format(#032f62;\">"%H:%M:%S"), 
                nodes[i].nonce, mark, nodes[i].last_hash
            );
        }

        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if nodes.iter().all(|n| n.stage == SyncStage::Sha256Mining && n.success) {
            println!(#032f62;\">"\n>>> SUCCESS: ALL NODES ATTAINED SHA-256 2-BIT FINALITY <<<");
            break;
        }
        round += 1;
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if round > 10000 { break; }
    }
}

src/bin/byz_time.rs

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy)]
#d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub struct Estimation {
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub d: f64, 
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub a: f64, 
}

#d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub fn estimate_offset(s: f64, r: f64, c: f64) -> Estimation {
    Estimation {
        d: c - (r + s) / 2.0,
        a: (r - s) / 2.0,
    }
}

#d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub struct SyncNode {
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub id: usize,
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub n: usize,
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub f: usize,
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub way_off: f64,
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub adj_p: f64,
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub state: String,
}

#d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">impl SyncNode {
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub fn new(id: usize, n: usize, f: usize, way_off: f64, initial_adj: f64) -> Self {
        Self {
            id, n, f, way_off,
            adj_p: initial_adj,
            state: String::from(#032f62;\">"Init"),
        }
    }

    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub fn get_local_time(&self) -> f64 {
        self.adj_p 
    }

    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub fn run_sync_cycle(&mut self, estimates: Vec<Estimation>) {
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut d_overs: Vec<f64> = estimates.iter().map(|e| e.d + e.a).collect();
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut d_unders: Vec<f64> = estimates.iter().map(|e| e.d - e.a).collect();

        d_overs.sort_by(|a, b| a.partial_cmp(b).unwrap());
        d_unders.sort_by(|a, b| a.partial_cmp(b).unwrap());

        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let m = d_overs[self.f]; 
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let m_large = d_unders[self.n - 1 - self.f];

        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let raw_adjustment = if m > -self.way_off && m_large < self.way_off {
            self.state = String::from(#032f62;\">"Synced");
            (m.min(0.0) + m_large.max(0.0)) / 2.0 
        } #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">else {
            self.state = String::from(#032f62;\">"RECOVERING");
            (m + m_large) / 2.0 
        };

        // 40% correction to visualize the halving convergence property
        self.adj_p += raw_adjustment * 0.4; 
    }
}

#d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub struct Network {
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub nodes: Vec<SyncNode>,
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub next_id: usize,
}

#d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">impl Network {
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub fn new() -> Self {
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut nodes = Vec::new();
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">for i in 0..10 {
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let offset = if i < 4 { 1000.0 } else { 0.0 };
            nodes.push(SyncNode::new(i, 10, 3, 20.0, offset));
        }
        Network { nodes, next_id: 10 }
    }

    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub fn simulate_step(&mut self) -> f64 {
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let current_n = self.nodes.len();
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut all_estimates = Vec::new();

        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">for p_idx in 0..current_n {
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut p_estimates = Vec::new();
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let s = self.nodes[p_idx].get_local_time();
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">for q_idx in 0..current_n {
                #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let c = self.nodes[q_idx].get_local_time();
                #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let r = self.nodes[p_idx].get_local_time();
                p_estimates.push(estimate_offset(s, r, c));
            }
            all_estimates.push(p_estimates);
        }

        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut min_t = f64::MAX;
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut max_t = f64::MIN;

        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">for i in 0..current_n {
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let estimates = all_estimates[i].clone();
            self.nodes[i].run_sync_cycle(estimates);
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let time = self.nodes[i].get_local_time();
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if time < min_t { min_t = time; }
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if time > max_t { max_t = time; }
            println!(#032f62;\">"Node {:03} | {:11} | Clock: {:7.2}", self.nodes[i].id, self.nodes[i].state, time);
        }
        max_t - min_t
    }
}

#d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">fn main() {
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut net = Network::new();
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut round = 1;
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut turnover_started = false;
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut turnover_complete = false;

    loop {
        println!(#032f62;\">"--- Round {:02} ---", round);
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let spread = net.simulate_step();

        // Phase 1 -> Phase 2 Transition
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if spread < 1.0 && !turnover_started {
            println!(#032f62;\">"\n>>> SYNC REACHED. COMMENCING TOTAL TURNOVER. <<<\n");
            turnover_started = true;
        }

        // Phase 2: Dropping originals
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if turnover_started && !turnover_complete {
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let to_drop = net.nodes.iter().find(|n| n.id < 10).map(|n| n.id);
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if let Some(id) = to_drop {
                println!(#032f62;\">">>> DROPPING ORIGINAL Node {:03} <<<", id);
                net.nodes.retain(|n| n.id != id);
                
                #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let new_id = net.next_id;
                println!(#032f62;\">">>> ADDING NEWCOMER Node {:03} (RECOVERING) <<<", new_id);
                net.nodes.push(SyncNode::new(new_id, 10, 3, 20.0, 800.0));
                net.next_id += 1;
            } #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">else {
                turnover_complete = true;
                println!(#032f62;\">"\n>>> TURNOVER COMPLETE. ALL ORIGINALS DROPPED. FINAL STABILIZATION. <<<\n");
            }
        }

        // Phase 3: Check for final sync of all newcomers
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let all_synced = net.nodes.iter().all(|n| n.state == "Synced");
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if turnover_complete && all_synced && spread < 1.0 {
            println!(#032f62;\">"\n>>> SUCCESS: ALL NEWCOMERS FULLY SYNCED. TERMINATING. <<<");
            break;
        }

        round += 1;
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if round > 300 { break; } 
    }
}

src/bin/utc_consensus.rs

#d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">use chrono::{DateTime, Duration, Utc};

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy)]
#d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub struct Estimation {
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub d: f64, // Difference in seconds
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub a: f64, // Uncertainty
}

#d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub fn estimate_offset(s: DateTime<Utc>, r: DateTime<Utc>, c: DateTime<Utc>) -> Estimation {
    // d = c - (r + s) / 2
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let send_receive_avg_ms = (r.timestamp_millis() + s.timestamp_millis()) / 2;
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let diff_ms = c.timestamp_millis() - send_receive_avg_ms;
    
    Estimation {
        d: diff_ms as f64 / 1000.0,
        a: (r.timestamp_millis() - s.timestamp_millis()) as f64 / 2000.0,
    }
}

#d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub struct SyncNode {
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub id: usize,
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub n: usize,
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub f: usize,
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub way_off: f64,
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub adjustment: Duration,
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub state: String,
}

#d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">impl SyncNode {
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub fn new(id: usize, n: usize, f: usize, way_off: f64, initial_offset_sec: i64) -> Self {
        Self {
            id, n, f, way_off,
            adjustment: Duration::seconds(initial_offset_sec),
            state: String::from(#032f62;\">"Init"),
        }
    }

    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub fn get_logical_utc(&self) -> DateTime<Utc> {
        Utc::now() + self.adjustment
    }

    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub fn run_sync_cycle(&mut self, estimates: Vec<Estimation>) {
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut d_overs: Vec<f64> = estimates.iter().map(|e| e.d + e.a).collect();
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut d_unders: Vec<f64> = estimates.iter().map(|e| e.d - e.a).collect();

        d_overs.sort_by(|a, b| a.partial_cmp(b).unwrap());
        d_unders.sort_by(|a, b| a.partial_cmp(b).unwrap());

        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let m = d_overs[self.f]; 
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let m_large = d_unders[self.n - 1 - self.f];

        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let raw_adj_sec = if m > -self.way_off && m_large < self.way_off {
            self.state = String::from(#032f62;\">"Synced");
            (m.min(0.0) + m_large.max(0.0)) / 2.0 
        } #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">else {
            self.state = String::from(#032f62;\">"RECOVERING");
            (m + m_large) / 2.0 
        };

        // Apply 40% of the correction (halving-style convergence)
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let apply_ms = (raw_adj_sec * 400.0) as i64;
        self.adjustment = self.adjustment + Duration::milliseconds(apply_ms);
    }
}

#d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub struct Network {
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub nodes: Vec<SyncNode>,
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub next_id: usize,
}

#d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">impl Network {
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub fn new() -> Self {
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut nodes = Vec::new();
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">for i in 0..10 {
            // Original nodes 0-3 are 1 hour (3600s) ahead
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let offset = if i < 4 { 3600 } else { 0 };
            nodes.push(SyncNode::new(i, 10, 3, 20.0, offset));
        }
        Network { nodes, next_id: 10 }
    }

    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">pub fn simulate_step(&mut self) -> f64 {
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let current_n = self.nodes.len();
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut all_estimates = Vec::new();

        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">for p_idx in 0..current_n {
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut p_estimates = Vec::new();
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let s = self.nodes[p_idx].get_logical_utc();
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">for q_idx in 0..current_n {
                #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let c = self.nodes[q_idx].get_logical_utc();
                #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let r = self.nodes[p_idx].get_logical_utc();
                p_estimates.push(estimate_offset(s, r, c));
            }
            all_estimates.push(p_estimates);
        }

        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut timestamps: Vec<i64> = Vec::new();
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">for i in 0..current_n {
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let estimates = all_estimates[i].clone();
            self.nodes[i].run_sync_cycle(estimates);
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let time = self.nodes[i].get_logical_utc();
            timestamps.push(time.timestamp_millis());
            println!(#032f62;\">"Node {:03} | {:11} | UTC: {}", self.nodes[i].id, self.nodes[i].state, time.format("%H:%M:%S%.3f"));
        }
        
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let min_t = *timestamps.iter().min().unwrap();
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let max_t = *timestamps.iter().max().unwrap();
        (max_t - min_t) as f64 / 1000.0
    }
}

#d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">fn main() {
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut net = Network::new();
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut round = 1;
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut turnover_started = false;
    #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let mut turnover_complete = false;

    loop {
        println!(#032f62;\">"--- Round {:02} ---", round);
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let spread_sec = net.simulate_step();

        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if spread_sec < 1.0 && !turnover_started {
            println!(#032f62;\">"\n>>> UTC SYNC REACHED. COMMENCING TOTAL TURNOVER. <<<\n");
            turnover_started = true;
        }

        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if turnover_started && !turnover_complete {
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let to_drop = net.nodes.iter().find(|n| n.id < 10).map(|n| n.id);
            #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if let Some(id) = to_drop {
                println!(#032f62;\">">>> DROPPING ORIGINAL Node {:03} <<<", id);
                net.nodes.retain(|n| n.id != id);
                
                #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let new_id = net.next_id;
                // Newcomer starts 2 hours (7200s) behind
                println!(#032f62;\">">>> ADDING NEWCOMER Node {:03} (RECOVERING) <<<", new_id);
                net.nodes.push(SyncNode::new(new_id, 10, 3, 20.0, -7200));
                net.next_id += 1;
            } #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">else {
                turnover_complete = true;
                println!(#032f62;\">"\n>>> TURNOVER COMPLETE. WAITING FOR NEWCOMER SYNC. <<<\n");
            }
        }

        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">let all_synced = net.nodes.iter().all(|n| n.state == "Synced");
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if turnover_complete && all_synced && spread_sec < 1.0 {
            println!(#032f62;\">"\n>>> SUCCESS: ALL NEWCOMERS SYNCED TO UTC CONSENSUS. <<<");
            break;
        }

        round += 1;
        #d73a49; font-weight: bold;\">if round > 500 { break; } 
    }
}

LLM CXML
